small.label: Small — Fast & Light
small.description: Perfect for quick questions, summaries, and everyday tasks. Works on almost any computer.
small.requirements: Minimum 4GB RAM, about 2–3GB of disk space

models.label: Phi 3 Mini

models.description: Google's lightweight model, fast and capable

models.label: Phi 3 Mini (CPU only)
models.description: Best choice if you have no dedicated GPU

medium.label: Medium — Balanced
medium.description: Great for writing, coding help, and longer conversations. Needs a decent computer.

models.label: Mistral 7B
models.description: One of the best 7B models, excellent at following instructions

models.label: Llama 3 8B
models.description: Meta's latest open model, very capable and well-rounded

large.label: Large — Most Capable
large.description: Best results for complex reasoning, coding, and creative work. Requires a powerful computer.

models.label: Llama 3 70B
